records.question: What organisations have organisation_details exactly equal to eveniet?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'eveniet'
records.pred_sql: SELECT organisation_id FROM Organisations WHERE organisation_details = 'eveniet'

records.question: Which organisations have organisation_details exactly impedit, grants with other_details exactly occaecati starting on or before 1985-10-09 20:08:49 and ending on or after 1985-06-08 00:22:07 with grant_amount exactly 281.2446, projects where project_details is non, and research_staff where staff_details is dolor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.grant_start_date <= '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND grants.other_details = 'occaecati' AND projects.project_details = 'non' AND grants.grant_end_date >= '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND grants.grant_amount = 281.2446 AND research_staff.staff_details = 'dolor'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
INNER JOIN Grants g ON o.organisation_id = g.organisation_id
INNER JOIN Projects p ON o.organisation_id = p.organisation_id
INNER JOIN Research_Staff rs ON o.organisation_id = rs.employer_organisation_id
WHERE o.organisation_details = 'impedit'
AND g.other_details = 'occaecati'
AND g.grant_start_date <= '1985-10-09 20:08:49'
AND g.grant_end_date >= '1985-06-08 00:22:07'
AND g.grant_amount = 281.2446
AND p.project_details = 'non'
AND rs.staff_details = 'dolor'

records.question: Which organisations have grants and projects where the project details are exactly et?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
WHERE projects.project_details = 'et'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
INNER JOIN Grants g ON o.organisation_id = g.organisation_id
INNER JOIN Projects p ON o.organisation_id = p.organisation_id
WHERE p.project_details = 'et'

records.question: Which organisations have grants with a grant end date exactly '1996-08-16 20:45:05' and a grant amount at least 608413.3291, have organisation details exactly 'eius', and also have related organisation types and research staff records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.grant_end_date = '1996-08-16 20:45:05' AND grants.grant_amount >= 608413.3291 AND organisations.organisation_details = 'eius'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
INNER JOIN Grants g ON o.organisation_id = g.organisation_id
INNER JOIN Organisation_Types ot ON o.organisation_type = ot.organisation_type
INNER JOIN Research_Staff rs ON o.organisation_id = rs.employer_organisation_id
WHERE g.grant_end_date = '1996-08-16 20:45:05'
AND g.grant_amount >= 608413.3291
AND o.organisation_details = 'eius'

records.question: Which organisations have organisation details exactly tenetur, have projects where the project details are exactly dolorem, employ research staff with staff details exactly consequatur, and received grants that started on 1986-10-31 17:11:29, ended on or after 2001-05-22 21:02:43, and amount to at most 610.7004?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE projects.project_details = 'dolorem' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'tenetur' AND grants.grant_start_date = '1986-10-31 17:11:29' AND grants.grant_end_date >= '2001-05-22 21:02:43' AND research_staff.staff_details = 'consequatur' AND grants.grant_amount <= 610.7004
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
WHERE o.organisation_details = 'tenetur'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Projects p
    WHERE p.organisation_id = o.organisation_id
    AND p.project_details = 'dolorem'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Research_Staff rs
    WHERE rs.employer_organisation_id = o.organisation_id
    AND rs.staff_details = 'consequatur'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Grants g
    WHERE g.organisation_id = o.organisation_id
    AND g.grant_start_date = '1986-10-31 17:11:29'
    AND g.grant_end_date >= '2001-05-22 21:02:43'
    AND g.grant_amount <= 610.7004
)

INNER JOIN Research_Staff rs ON o.organisation_id = rs.employer_organisation_id

records.question: Which organisations have organisation details exactly impedit, are involved in projects where project details is deleniti, and received grants with other details exactly occaecati, grant start date on 1985-10-09 20:08:49, grant end date on 1985-06-08 00:22:07, and grant amount at least 281.2446?

JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND grants.grant_end_date = '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND projects.project_details = 'deleniti' AND grants.grant_start_date = '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND grants.grant_amount >= 281.2446 AND grants.other_details = 'occaecati'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
INNER JOIN Projects p ON o.organisation_id = p.organisation_id
INNER JOIN Grants g ON o.organisation_id = g.organisation_id
WHERE o.organisation_details = 'impedit'
AND p.project_details = 'deleniti'

AND g.grant_start_date = '1985-10-09 20:08:49'
AND g.grant_end_date = '1985-06-08 00:22:07'
AND g.grant_amount >= 281.2446

records.question: What organisations have organisation details exactly equal to eius and have both grants and research staff associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'eius'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
WHERE o.organisation_details = 'eius'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM Grants g WHERE g.organisation_id = o.organisation_id
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM Research_Staff rs WHERE rs.employer_organisation_id = o.organisation_id
)

records.question: What organisations have organisation_details exactly equal to et, with staff whose staff_details is quo and projects where project_details is beatae?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE research_staff.staff_details = 'quo' AND projects.project_details = 'beatae' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'et'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.organisation_id
FROM Organisations o
INNER JOIN Research_Staff rs ON o.organisation_id = rs.employer_organisation_id
INNER JOIN Projects p ON o.organisation_id = p.organisation_id
WHERE o.organisation_details = 'et'
AND rs.staff_details = 'quo'
AND p.project_details = 'beatae'
